game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.description: Brain Test: Tricky Puzzles - A brain-teasing puzzle game where each level presents a unique challenge that requires creative thinking. The puzzles may seem simple at first, but the solution often lies in thinking outside the box. Interact with objects, discover hidden elements, and use unconventional approaches to solve each puzzle. Take your time - there's no timer! Complete all puzzles across 3 levels to win the game.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Cycle through interactive objects (Left/Right for previous/next)
Shift + Arrow Keys: Move/drag the selected object in the arrow direction
Space: Interact with (tap) the currently selected object
Z: Toggle hint display (costs 25 points)
Enter: Start game from menu
Escape: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart (return to menu)
